testcase.name: should run a simple test
should have test environment configured
should demonstrate Jest test structure
should demonstrate async test structure
should demonstrate mocking structure
should create mock request/response objects
should use JestTestHelpers for validation
should create account when valid data is provided
should return 409 when account already exists
should handle missing email field
should handle missing password field
should handle missing firstName field
should handle missing lastName field
should handle empty string fields
should handle null fields
should handle undefined fields
should handle whitespace-only fields
should return 403 when user is already authenticated
should handle service errors during registration
should handle empty request body
should handle malformed request body
should handle concurrent registration attempts
should handle email case sensitivity
should handle very long field values
should handle email with special characters
should handle names with special characters
should prevent password logging in console output
should create location point when valid data is provided
should handle invalid location data
should handle service errors during location creation
should return location point when valid ID is provided
should return 404 when location point is not found
should handle invalid location ID parameter
should handle service errors during location retrieval
should return animal when valid ID is provided
should return 404 when animal is not found
should handle invalid animal ID parameter
should handle service errors during animal retrieval
should return animals when valid search parameters are provided
should handle empty search results
should handle invalid search parameters
should handle service errors during animal search
should create animal when valid data is provided
should return 404 when animal type does not exist
should return 404 when chipping location does not exist
should return 404 when chipper does not exist
should handle invalid animal data
should update animal when valid data is provided
should return 404 when animal to update is not found
should validate animal types when updating
should handle invalid animal ID
should delete animal when valid ID is provided
should return 404 when animal to delete is not found
should return 400 when animal cannot be deleted
should handle invalid animal ID
should add animal type when valid data is provided
should return 404 when animal does not exist
should return 404 when animal type does not exist
should remove animal type when valid data is provided
should return 400 when trying to remove the only animal type
should return 404 when animal type is not associated with animal
should change animal type when valid data is provided
should return 409 when animal already has the new type
should return 404 when animal does not have the old type
should handle concurrent animal operations
should handle large animal lists in search
should create account when valid data is provided
should handle invalid account data
should handle service errors during account creation
should create account when valid data and animal IDs are provided
should return 400 when some animal IDs do not exist
should create account without animal validation when no animal IDs provided
should handle invalid account data with animal validation
should return accounts when email query parameter is provided
should return all accounts when no email query parameter is provided
should handle empty account list
should handle service errors during account listing
should return accounts when valid search parameters are provided
should handle empty search results
should handle invalid search parameters
should handle service errors during account search
should return account when valid ID is provided
should return 404 when account is not found
should handle invalid account ID parameter
should handle service errors during account retrieval
should update account when valid data and ownership are provided
should return 403 when user does not own the account
should handle invalid account ID
should handle service errors during account update
should delete account when valid ID and ownership are provided
should return 403 when user does not own the account
should return 400 when account has dependent animals
should handle invalid account ID
should handle service errors during account deletion
should validate email format
should validate password strength
should validate name fields
should not expose password in response
should require authentication for protected operations
should handle large account lists
should handle concurrent account operations

testcase.name: should return 404 when animal does not exist

testcase.name: should return 400 when animal has not left chipping location

testcase.name: should return 400 when new location is same as last visited

testcase.name: should handle invalid animal ID or location ID

testcase.name: should handle service errors during visited location creation

testcase.name: should return 404 when animal does not exist

testcase.name: should return 404 when visited location not found

testcase.name: should return 400 when updating first visited location to chipping location

testcase.name: should return 400 when new location is same as current

testcase.name: should return 400 when new location is same as previous

testcase.name: should return 400 when new location is same as next

testcase.name: should return 409 when user already exists

testcase.name: should return 400 for invalid registration data

testcase.name: should return 403 when user is already authenticated

testcase.name: should update account information

testcase.name: should return 403 when updating someone else's account

testcase.name: should delete account successfully

should handle unsupported HTTP methods

testcase.name: should return consistent error response format

testcase.name: should not expose sensitive information in error responses
